ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "survey_version" INTEGER /* Version of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Draft, Active, Completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., Likert scale, Yes/No) */,
  "response_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the response (e.g., 1-7, 1-5) */,
  "question_version" INTEGER /* Version of the question */,
  "question_status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., Draft, Active, Archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the question */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value of the response (if applicable) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Textual value of the response (if applicable) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "response_version" INTEGER /* Version of the response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., Active, Rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the response */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was recorded */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent (e.g., Full Time, Part Time, Not Working) */,
  "year_of_response" INTEGER /* Year the respondent participated in the survey */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses provided by the respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "educational_level" TEXT /* Educational level of the respondent */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the respondent record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the respondent record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the respondent record was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the respondent record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question analyzed */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the analysis was performed */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who gave a specific response */,
  "lower_confidence" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the percentage */,
  "upper_confidence" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the percentage */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the response (if applicable) */,
  "analysis_version" INTEGER /* Version of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_employment_status FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status") REFERENCES respondents ("employment_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
